title: Payments & Settlements
subtitle: Money in, money out, and what Razorpay has settled to your Linked Account.

reconcile.toggleTitle: Audit our DB against Razorpay’s API for a date range

pending.note: · auto-flagged when bookings were cancelled; not yet sent to Razorpay

stuck.note: · submitted to Razorpay; webhook hasn’t arrived yet

recon.title: Reconciliation
recon.desc: Audit our payments + refunds against Razorpay’s API for a date range. Max 31 days per run.
recon.notOnRazorpay: This hotel isn’t on Razorpay (mode=NONE). Configure DIRECT or ROUTE in Owner Settings first.
recon.allClear: All clear — our records match Razorpay for this window.
recon.idle: Pick a date range and run. We’ll fetch each payment + refund from Razorpay and report any mismatches.

refresh.stillReports: Razorpay still reports “{{status}}” — try again in a few minutes.

footer: Showing the most recent {{shown}} of {{total}} payments for the selected window. Settlement timing for Razorpay payouts to your Linked Account is governed by your Razorpay agreement (usually T+1 to T+3 business days). The amounts here reflect what was captured, not what has hit your bank account.
